stocks.impact_theory: MongoDB plunged amid broad tech sell-off triggered by US-Iran war escalation, oil spike, and risk-off sentiment. Economic implications: higher energy costs fuel inflation, hurting growth stocks. Market psychology: flight to safety, parallels 2022 Ukraine invasion tech rout. Analogy 1: Tech as canary in coal mine dying first in volatility storm. Analogy 2: Overvalued balloon popping on geopolitical pin.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket -27%, YTD -40% on software weakness; web news highlights stark declines; X chatter on losers confirms negative sentiment shift.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dips for 15-20% rebound if de-escalation, post-earnings recovery
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 10-15% further downside on sustained risk-off
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Surprise positive guidance, broader market bounce, high short interest squeeze.

stocks.justification: Prominent in multiple premarket loser lists and news, clear sector rotation.

stocks.impact_theory: Top premarket gainer +8.79% on oil surge from Iran Strait of Hormuz fears, LNG supply risks. Implications: higher energy prices boost exporters. Psychology: scramble for commodities. Parallels: 2022 Russia-Ukraine energy rally. Analogy 1: Rocket fueled by war panic. Analogy 2: Whale swimming upstream in geopolitical tide.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil spikes 7-13%, LNG halt in Qatar; Benzinga lists top gainer; X posts highlight energy winners.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or small for -5% if quick resolution
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: De-escalation, oversupply, demand drop from recession.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to oil/LNG news, top mover status.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil producer up on WTI/Brent surge from Middle East war, supply disruption fears. Implications: profit margins expand. Psychology: bet on higher-for-longer energy. Parallels: Gulf War oil shocks. Analogy 1: Miner striking gold in chaos. Analogy 2: Shark feasting on bloody waters.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +4.56%, energy sector rally in news; X semantic on oil impacted stocks.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: OPEC+ increase output, global slowdown curbs demand.

stocks.justification: Strong sector tailwind but less specific mention than LNG.

stocks.impact_theory: Defense giant rallies on US strikes on Iran, escalation fears boost orders. Implications: govt spending surge. Psychology: war premium. Parallels: post-9/11 defense boom. Analogy 1: Blacksmith thriving in wartime forge. Analogy 2: Insurance policy skyrocketing in hurricane season.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts, news on defense winners like LMT +7% premarket; rotation to safe sectors.

stocks.justification: Repeated mentions in defense rally context.

stocks.impact_theory: Airline hammered by oil spike, fuel costs soar, travel fears from war. Implications: margins crushed, demand soft. Psychology: avoidance of risk assets. Parallels: 2022 oil-driven airline pain. Analogy 1: Bird grounded by headwind. Analogy 2: Lemon stand in rainstorm.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News lists airlines top losers -3-10%; higher oil explicit headwind; X confirms.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Value buy for 15% recovery on oil drop
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 10% on sustained high oil

stocks.justification: Clear sector loser from news, but hedges may mitigate.
